summary: Verified calendar event class/section scoping — backend GET /api/events filters correctly (class-1/section-A gets both scoped+wide; class-2/section-B gets only wide; no filter returns both). Parent dashboard endpoint /api/parent/dashboard/{id} correctly returns school-wide + matching class/section events and excludes other-class events. sendNotification with no matching students returns 200. Frontend Add-Event dialog exposes event-class and event-section dropdowns; scoped event renders as sky pill with 'LKG-A' badge and toast 'Event added (Class LKG-A)'; school-wide event renders as amber pill with no badge and toast 'Event added (school-wide)'. All seeded events cleaned up.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: request said parent endpoint is /api/parent-dashboard/{studentId}; actual route is /api/parent/dashboard/{student_id}. Not a bug — just make sure UI/docs match.
Event dialog does not disable the 'Add Event' submit button while an API request is in-flight; rapid double-clicks could create duplicate events.
Section dropdown is disabled only until a class is picked; if a class has no sections defined it still shows the trigger. Minor UX polish only.
seed_data_creation: Events seeded during tests are auto-cleaned up (both backend fixture teardown and UI delete loop). Backend test creates events with class '1' section 'A' and school-wide equivalents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real classes in this DB are 'LKG' and 'CLASS-5TH'; if writing UI tests, pick from those options. Backend accepts any string for studentClass/section. Parent dashboard route is /api/parent/dashboard/{id}, not /api/parent-dashboard/{id}.
